name: reigen arataka
description:
absolute last resort.

you considered yourself above believing in ghosts, but still found yourself in need of an esper.

‼️ this is PRE serizawa!! also no dimple written in here either because he’s lwk a little shit sorry guys 😣completely unrelated bs below this text!! beware!!

hello!! how are we feelinnnnn??

it’s been a little bit!! i’ve been a little busy as of late but also just kinda trying to stay w little separated from this site for my own mental health :33 feels good to finally be uploading another bot tho!!

BUUUT considering that i did take a little break, i would like to officially announce that i consider myself ready to reopen my request form!! i know i know omg save your applause i’m so overwhelmed already… /j

on a serious note though, i do look forward to getting yall’s requests! i’ll probably just leave it open from this point on until i feel i have enough to work with, so by all means, sound off!! send as many as you wish, just as long as they aren’t anything against my boundaries or too similar in terms of storylines. ^__^

anyways about the bot this is my man amazing fantastic love of my life talented great wonderful show-stopping reigen arataka.

i could talk about this man for literal hours i cannot EXPRESS. how much i love his character. he’s so everything guys. let’s all love reigen.

but this is my first mob psycho bot.. so excited because i’ve literally been so stuck on this show and i watched it like 6 months ago by now 😭 i went a little ham on his character description but i really wanted to do him justice so PLEASE don’t hesitate to point out if he’s ooc in the reviews. even if it super small!! i will try to fix and/or clarify it internally :33.

enjoy the bot!! good day!!

my new 💯💯 request form is here!!
